answers: Identify triggers, medication (acute and preventive), dark quiet room during attack.
Migraine tips: consult a professional for personalized advice. Don't self-diagnose or self-treat serious conditions.
Learn more about migraine from trusted medical sources. Always follow your doctor's advice.
